Banner.subtitleLine1: All-in-one platform for managing services, staff, branches, bookings, payments, and
Banner.subtitleLine2: customer data — with your own branded mini-website.

HowItWorks.title: How Bokli Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Manage appointments, staff schedules, services, and customer interactions seamlessly through Bokli's intelligent, automated booking system.

steps.title: Create Your Business Account
steps.desc: Sign up, add your business details, and instantly get your branded booking mini-website.

steps.title: Add Services, Staff & Branches
steps.desc: Set up your services, assign staff, and (if premium) manage multiple branches.

steps.title: Start Accepting Bookings
steps.desc: Share your booking link anywhere and receive appointments directly — with optional online payments.

ProjectSelector.title: What is Your Project?
ProjectSelector.subtitleLine1: Describe your project so Bokli can personalize your booking
ProjectSelector.subtitleLine2: system, services, staff, and workflow instantly.

KeyFeatures.title: Key Features
KeyFeatures.subtitle: Explore powerful features designed to simplify bookings, manage staff, track performance, and grow your business faster.

features.title: Merchant Dashboard
features.desc: Design a modern, data-driven Merchant Dashboard with a clean, minimalistic layout

features.title: Staff Management
features.desc: A comprehensive module designed to streamline team oversight with a modern, intuitive interface

features.title: Smart Booking Scheduler
features.desc: Built for efficiency and clarity, it helps businesses optimize operations while providing users

features.title: Mini-Website Builder
features.desc: A compact yet powerful platform designed to help anyone create stunning, responsive websites in minutes

features.title: Payment Integration
features.desc: Design a seamless, secure, and user-friendly payment interface that supports multiple payment methods

Pricing.title: Choose The Perfect Plan
Pricing.subtitle: Select the right plan designed to support your growth, streamline bookings, and unlock advanced features when needed.

basic.name: Basic Plan
basic.desc: Start with essential tools to manage bookings, services, and customers efficiently—perfect for growing small businesses.

premium.name: Premium Plan
premium.desc: Unlock advanced booking features, multiple branches, customization tools, and powerful analytics to scale your business effortlessly.

WhyChooseBokli.title: Why Choose Bokli?
WhyChooseBokli.subtitle: Bokli simplifies bookings, boosts efficiency, and helps businesses deliver a seamless customer experience with zero hassle.

items.title: Lightning Fast Setup
items.description: Go from sign-up to live booking page in minutes.

items.title: Professional Design
items.description: Modern, clean interface that impresses customers and reflects your brand.

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Designed to support thousands of merchants smoothly.

items.title: Secure Payments
items.description: Fully integrated with trusted payment gateways.

items.title: All-in-One Control
items.description: Manage services, staff, bookings, and customer data from one platform.

items.title: Perfect for All Businesses
items.description: Salons, spas, clinics, tutors, garages, fitness trainers, and more.

MiniWebsiteBuilder.title: Mini-Website Builder
MiniWebsiteBuilder.subtitle: Make your online presence truly yours with powerful customization options that give you complete control over your brand.
